goal: Add isolated read-only session value comparison, layered occurrence details, disabled write-target recommendations, pre-apply review scaffolding, fixture-only target write proof, and disabled real write-target UI shape without enabling real layered writes.

sessionValueProjection.behavior: Compares active CurrentValueProjection with read-only session layered values per setting row.
sessionValueProjection.uiBehavior: When a session preview is active, setting details can show Active config value, Session preview value, status, and session source.

layeredOccurrenceDetails.behavior: Layered scalar occurrences now carry generated/script-managed and symlink-managed flags plus friendly notes.

writeTargetRecommendations.behavior: Builds future-only recommendations from fixture-only write target candidates, including recommended, other possible, and blocked locations.

preApplyReviewScaffold.behavior: Layered settings show disabled pre-apply review copy explaining future save location choice, exact backup requirement, generated/script-managed caution, and inactive real write-target selection.

fixtureWriteTargetProof.behavior: Fixture-only helper backs up a fixture target file, rewrites one scalar line, rereads and verifies the fixture value, and preserves unrelated lines.

disabledWriteTargetUi.behavior: Save location UI shape is visible for layered settings but every target control is disabled.

uiChanges: Shared in-memory config selection state between Config page and detail renderer for read-only session comparison.
Added session preview comparison lines to Current value section when session preview is active.
Added generated/script-managed and symlink notes to layered occurrence details.
Added disabled pre-apply review and Save location scaffold for layered settings.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed with this sprint changes plus pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts

proofUsed: Rust source inspection of CurrentConfigSnapshot, ConfigGraphSummary, ConfigSelectionState, SessionConfigPreview, write_flow, and UI detail rendering.
Fixture tests for session value comparison, layered occurrence flags, recommendation model, disabled UI scaffold, and fixture-only backup/write/reread proof.
Source-level tests proving disabled write-target UI and pre-apply scaffolding do not call production Apply.
proofStillMissing: No real user config writes are proven or enabled.
No real layered write-target selection is active.
No live Hyprland reload or runtime mutation proof is claimed.
nextRecommendedSprint: Use the read-only comparison and fixture proof to design a guarded real write-target review flow, but keep it disabled until exact backup, target selection, generated/script-managed confirmation, and reread proof are complete.
